title: DVDMS-568 Tokyo ○ Wa Special Project Heavyweight Women's Amares Strengthening Player Haruna (24 years old) AV debut! !! Height 175 cm! Bust 115cm! Waist 98 cm! Hip 108cm! A sad monster because of its nonstandard physique and strength

She spends her days practicing aiming for O * n * k in a famous sports business group, and she confesses her secret sexual desire and the reason why she hit the AV gate herself. !! Don't miss the super-rare debut video of a sad monster who wasn't satisfied with her sexuality because of her strong body and strength!
